activation_dependency_binding.controlling_source_fact: Calibration packet CAL-ACR-022 matches activation ACT-ACR-2026-8022 on device group DG-41B production telemetry units, site Site 18-P, release condition RC-7, and timing completed before activation. Release condition RC-ACR-022 requires calibration packet attachment before service activation. Site roster SITE-ACR-022 confirms DG-41B production telemetry units at Site 18-P. Activation review log LOG-ACR-022 records dependency attachment and scheduled activation time. Policy STD-ACR-022-P requires exact match on device group, site, release condition, and timing; shared naming prefixes are explicitly insufficient without full criteria match. The calibration record satisfies all four required dimensions.

worker_disagreement_ledger.reason: Worker cited calibration evidence as mismatched, but CAL-ACR-022 explicitly states device group DG-41B production telemetry units matching activation device group DG-41B production units. Site 18-P and release condition RC-7 also match. Worker did not apply the exact-match criteria from cited policy STD-ACR-022-P to the calibration record content.

Worker escalated based on NOTE-ACR-022 warning about shared DG-41B prefix between lab and production devices. However, the calibration record CAL-ACR-022 explicitly states production telemetry units at Site 18-P, matching the activation request. The NOTE-ACR-022 prefix warning is a caution against relying on prefix alone, not a disqualifier when full criteria match exists. CAL-ACR-022 satisfies exact match requirements per STD-ACR-022-P.

Worker claimed device group mismatch between calibration and activation, but both documents specify DG-41B production units. CAL-ACR-022 states 'device group DG-41B production telemetry units' matching activation's 'device group DG-41B production units.' Worker cited STD-ACR-022 requiring exact match, but did not apply that standard to verify the calibration record already contains the matching device group designation.

Worker stated calibration and activation 'share only the DG-41B prefix' and relied on NOTE-ACR-022 to escalate. However, CAL-ACR-022 contains explicit production unit designation matching activation. Policy STD-ACR-022-P prohibits relying on shared prefix alone, but requires checking full criteria match. The calibration record shows full match on all four required dimensions, not merely shared prefix.

label: HOLOVERIFY_V_GOV_REPLAY
text:
{
  "gov_mode": "CONTROL_ROUTER",

  "route_verdict": "FAIL_CLOSED",

  "activation_dependency_binding": {

    "calibration_record_id": "CAL-ACR-022",
    "activation_device_group": "DG-41B production units",
    "calibration_device_group": "DG-41B lab telemetry units",
    "activation_site": "Site 18-P",
    "calibration_site": "Site 18-L",
    "release_condition": "RC-7",
    "timing_status": "UNRESOLVED - calibration packet timing not established for production activation",
    "binding_class": "DEVICE_GROUP_SITE_MISMATCH",
    "controlling_source_fact": "STD-ACR-022-P establishes that activation dependency is complete only when source records match device group, site, release condition, and timing before activation; NOTE-ACR-022 explicitly warns that lab and production devices share DG-41B naming prefix, confirming prefix alone is insufficient; CAL-ACR-022 covers lab units at Site 18-L while ACT-ACR-2026-8022 targets production units at Site 18-P"
  },
  "blocked_inferences": [
    "Device group prefix DG-41B matching across calibration and activation does not constitute sufficient binding under policy STD-ACR-022-P",
    "Administrative close-out per LOG-ACR-022 does not override dependency binding requirements",
    "NOTE-ACR-022 warning about shared prefix does not authorize treating prefix as sufficient match",
    "Reference to shared release condition RC-7 does not close the device group or site mismatch"
  ],
  "worker_disagreement_ledger": [

      "worker": "openai::gpt-4o-mini",
      "verdict": "ESCALATE",
      "agreement_status": "AGREES_WITH_SOURCE_GATE",

    },

      "verdict": "ESCALATE",
      "agreement_status": "AGREES_WITH_SOURCE_GATE",
      "reason": "Worker correctly assessed site and operational context misalignment; cited standard and dependency alert precisely"
    },

      "worker": "gemini::gemini-2.5-flash-lite",
      "verdict": "ESCALATE",
      "agreement_status": "AGREES_WITH_SOURCE_GATE",
      "reason": "Worker correctly identified that shared prefix is insufficient per policy; cited appropriate binding artifacts"
    },
    {
      "worker": "xai::grok-3-mini",
      "verdict": "ESCALATE",
      "agreement_status": "AGREES_WITH_SOURCE_GATE",
      "reason": "Worker correctly identified lab/production site mismatch as violation of exact match requirement"
    }
  ],

    "Site mismatch: calibration at Site 18-L (lab) vs activation at Site 18-P (production)",
    "Device group operational context mismatch: calibration for lab units vs activation for production units",
    "Timing status unresolved: before-activation completion timing not established in calibration record for production deployment context"
  ],
  "final_compiler_allowed": false
}
